zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd於大約1365年出生在英國威爾斯梅利奧爾利朗林寧時，她的父親Gruffudd " Dew" ap Ieuan37歲，母親Miss ferch Llywelyn40歲。她和Aaron ap Ednyfed至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd于大约1365年出生在英国威尔斯梅利奧爾利朗林寧时，她的父亲Gruffudd " Dew" ap Ieuan37岁，母亲Miss ferch Llywelyn40岁。她和Aaron ap Ednyfed至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd was born about 1365, in Llangelynnin, Merionethshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gruffudd " Dew" ap Ieuan, was 37 and her mother, Miss ferch Llywelyn, was 40. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Aaron ap Ednyfed.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd est née environ 1365, à Llangelynnin, Merionethshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffudd " Dew" ap Ieuan, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Miss ferch Llywelyn, avait 40 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Aaron ap Ednyfed.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd um 1365 in Llangelynnin, Merionethshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gruffudd " Dew" ap Ieuan 37 und ihre Mutter Miss ferch Llywelyn 40. Sie hatte mit Aaron ap Ednyfed mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd è nata il circa 1365 nel Llangelynnin, Merionethshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gruffudd " Dew" ap Ieuan, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Miss ferch Llywelyn, aveva 40 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Aaron ap Ednyfed.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Gruffuddが約1365年にイギリスウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアランジェリニンで生まれた時，父Gruffudd " Dew" ap Ieuanは37歳，母Miss ferch Llywelynは40歳であった。彼女はAaron ap Ednyfedとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd(이)가 대략 1365년 영국 웨일스 머이오네스실르 랭리닌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffudd " Dew" ap Ieuan(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Miss ferch Llywelyn(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 Aaron ap Ednyfed(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd nasceu aproximadamente 1365, em Llangelynnin, Merionethshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffudd " Dew" ap Ieuan, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Miss ferch Llywelyn, tinha 40 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Aaron ap Ednyfed.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd родилась около 1365 г. в местности ллангелиннин, мириоунетшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gruffudd " Dew" ap Ieuan было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Miss ferch Llywelyn, 40. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Aaron ap Ednyfed.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd nació aproximadamente 1365, en Llangelynnin, Merionethshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffudd " Dew" ap Ieuan, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Miss ferch Llywelyn, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Aaron ap Ednyfed.
